name: Pravin Kumar Agrawal

professionalSummary: Senior Software Engineer with 11+ years of experience designing and delivering enterprise-grade web applications across customer identity, authentication, profile management, media, telecommunications, and smart-city platforms. Specialized in ReactJS, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, and modern frontend architecture with a strong focus on performance, accessibility, developer experience, and platform scalability. Experienced in leading cross-functional initiatives, mentoring engineers, and delivering secure, customer-facing solutions used by global audiences.

projects.title: Global Identity, Authentication, User Profile Management, Customer & Clients Management Tool
bullets: Designed scalable frontend foundations using ReactJS, Next.js, and TypeScript, establishing reusable micro frontend architectural patterns adopted across the engineering ecosystem.
Modernized 6+ legacy applications by migrating to Redux Toolkit and GraphQL integrations, reducing architectural complexity while improving viewport rendering performance and maintainability.
Engineered secure enterprise-scale identity and access management (IAM) features—including MFA, RBAC, and session provisioning—safeguarding authentication workflows for global customer volumes.
Drove WCAG accessibility compliance and enterprise localization initiatives using Transifex, enabling inclusive user experiences and multilingual support across international markets.

Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver scalable microservice-driven solutions, mentor engineers, conduct architecture reviews, and promote engineering best practices across the organization.
